business.name: Aziana
business.type: Waterfront Asian fusion restaurant and bar
business.location: Bobby's Marina, Juancho Yrausquin Boulevard #22, Philipsburg, Sint Maarten

guest_actions.online_ordering: Use the Order Online button on the website.
guest_actions.reservations: Use the Reserve a Table button, call Aziana, or send a WhatsApp message.
guest_actions.catering_events: Ask for the event date, number of guests, budget, food preferences and contact details, then hand off to Aziana.
guest_actions.general_questions: Use WhatsApp or email for direct guest inquiries.
